res.name: SocietyPress
res.desc: A free, open-source membership management platform built specifically for genealogical and historical societies. Manage members, events, a research library, genealogical records, newsletters, volunteers, lineage programs, donations, a store, and more — all in one place. Built on WordPress.

features.feature: Membership management with tiers, renewals, and self-service portal
Event calendar with registration, waitlists, and Stripe/PayPal payments
Research library with OPAC-style catalog and Open Library covers
Genealogical record collections with GENRECORD and GEDCOM import/export
Surname Research Database with Soundex and Metaphone phonetic search
Lineage Programs (First Families, Pioneer Settlers, etc.) with public roster and printable certificates
Picture Wall — member-submitted ancestor portraits with admin moderation
Newsletter archive with PDF upload and automatic cover thumbnails
Volunteer management with opportunities, signups, and hours tracking
Online donations with Stripe (one-time, monthly, annual) and PayPal (one-time)
Cover-the-fee toggle and recurring giving with automatic receipts
Online store with Stripe checkout, per-item shipping, and PayPal Smart Buttons
Secure online voting and elections with tier-based eligibility
Public Help Requests forum with email-verified submission, time-tracking on every response, and accept-as-answer
Optional Paid Research Services with Stripe-billed up-front cases, researcher dashboard, and additional-hours invoicing
Committee chair dashboards with auto-scoped admin views for events, meetings, and volunteer opportunities
Theme Exchange — export and import design presets between societies
Page builder with 24+ widget types including Research Guides and Database Subscriptions
5 pre-built child themes plus a Theme Gallery of importable design presets
One-click full-site export (members, events, library, records, donations)
Full GDPR data exporters and erasers (members, donations, lineage, registrations, etc.)
Role-based access control with 10 access areas and 8 role templates
15 toggleable feature modules

en.install_desc: Set up your society's website. After installation, you'll be able to log in and start adding members, events, and content right away.
en.admin_desc: This is the login for the site administrator — typically the webmaster or board member who manages the website.
en.org_desc: Basic information about your genealogical or historical society.
